name: button-filled
title: ButtonFilled
description: Square filled primary icon button. Intent-based colours with contrast fill pairing (bold→faint fg, strong→medium, medium→strong, faint→bold).

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by ButtonFilled. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.

peerDependencies.frameworks: None — works with React 17+, Angular 12+, plain HTML, and any framework with Custom Element support.
